title: SOULCRAFTED
description: Minecraft if it was made by fromsoftware
body:
# Welcome, slayer, to the remnants of a lost world.
![The soulscrafted modpack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74fb251c2ae6bc90bc30f66e8d129eb1c8c188f0.png)

_You must defeat the seven deadly sins and slay whatever crosses your path._

### FEATURES
- 🐉 **BOSSES GALORE** 20+ Bosses for maximum pain and suffering, including epic dragons and other creatures of evil!
- ⚔️ **COMBAT OVERHAUL** Over 100+ different and varied weapons, as well as many new accessories and... MAGIC!
- 🏰 **WORLD OVERHAUL** Over 50+ new biomes and 100+ structures to discover and vanquish!
- 🍽️ **HUNGRY?** Over 60+ new food and meals!
- 😈 **DIFFICULTY** Much harder difficulty
- ⛅ **DEEPER SKIES** New dimension: The Aether!
- 📜 **QUESTS** New quest system!
- 👨‍👦‍👦 **MULTIPLAYER SUPPORT** Play with your friends! (with voice chat too!)

### MODLIST
